3066120.name: konchi
3066120.description:
The legendary Konchi character game is finally here!

Konchi is a clicker game where you click on different Konchis.

Get a random Konchi every 30 minutes to increase your collection.

Konchi have a rarity, and the higher the rarity, the lower the drop probability.

Aim to acquire rare Konchi!

<Konchi rarity (in order of lowest to highest)

Normal Konchi

Rare Konchi: 20%.

Double Rare Konchi: 10%

Super Rare Konchi: 7%

Hyper Rare Konchi: 5%

Golden Konchi: 0.10%

Rainbow Konchi(coming soon)

We are also looking for Konchi designs on the Discord! Your design may appear in the game. We are looking forward to hearing from you.
